articles.title: One-two punch delivered in global operation disrupts cybercrime "assembly line"
articles.content: "Operation Endgame" simultaneously disrupts two widely used crime tools.
articles.titleZh: 在全球运营中交付的两拳颠覆了网络犯罪“装配线”
articles.contentZh: “结局行动”同时扰乱了两种广泛使用的犯罪工具。

articles.title: White House drastically shortens deadline for dropping quantum-vulnerable crypto
articles.content: Order warns of national security risks if post-quantum cryptography isn't adopted in time.
articles.titleZh: 白宫大幅缩短放弃易受量子攻击的加密货币的截止日期
articles.contentZh: 如果未及时采用后量子加密技术，命令将警告国家安全风险。

articles.title: Oracle’s 21,000 layoffs help drive its debt-fueled AI investments
articles.content: Oracle is spending billions on data center infrastructure to support AI.
articles.titleZh: 甲骨文的21,000次裁员有助于推动其以债务为动力的人工智能投资
articles.contentZh: 甲骨文正在花费数十亿美元用于数据中心基础设施，以支持人工智能。

articles.title: Following user outcry, AMD reinstates memory encryption in consumer CPUs
articles.content: Critics saw the move as an underhanded way to steer them toward more costly chips.
articles.titleZh: 在用户强烈抗议后， AMD在消费者CPU中恢复内存加密
articles.contentZh: 批评人士认为，此举是将他们引向更昂贵的芯片的卑鄙方式。

articles.title: The top tech Prime Day deals to shop on day two
articles.content: Welcome to day two of Amazon’s four-day Prime Day event, which, if we’re being honest, looks a lot like day one. That’s actually good news, though, because many of the best deals are still around, and some new ones have joined them. If you’ve got a Prime subscription, whether through a free trial or a […]
articles.titleZh: 在第二天购物的顶级科技Prime Day优惠
articles.contentZh: 欢迎来到亚马逊为期四天的Prime Day活动的第二天，如果我们说实话，这看起来很像第一天。不过，这实际上是个好消息，因为许多最好的交易仍然存在，一些新的交易已经加入其中。如果您有Prime订阅，无论是通过免费试用还是[…]

articles.title: This year’s Prime Day deals on Apple products are the best I’ve seen
articles.content: Amazon’s Prime Day is now in its second day, and whether you’re looking for a new pair of wireless earbuds or a smartwatch, there’s a good chance you’ll find a discount. The Apple Watch Series 11 has already dropped to a new low price, while the AirPods Pro 3 are discounted to $179. With Tim […]
articles.titleZh: 今年苹果产品的Prime Day优惠是我见过的最好的
articles.contentZh: 亚马逊的Prime Day现已进入第二天，无论您是在寻找一副新的无线耳机还是智能手表，您都很有可能会找到折扣。Apple Watch Series 11已经降至新的低价，而AirPods Pro 3的折扣为$ 179。与Tim […]
